faqs.a: Ajoyal Food Products mein premium spices, condiments, and ready-to-cook range hai. Full catalogue share kar deta/deti hoon — aap apna WhatsApp number confirm karein. Sample order ke liye yahan click karein: [LINK]

MOQ product-wise vary karta hai — generally initial orders ₹10,000-25,000 range mein hote hain. Pricing details ke liye humara representative aapko call karega. Aap apna city aur requirement share karenge?
Pan-India delivery available hai. Metro cities mein 3-5 days, other areas 5-8 days. Aapka pincode/city batayein? Sample order ke liye yahan click karein: [LINK]
Distributor banne ke liye ek simple onboarding form bharna hoga. Link yahan hai: [LINK]. Humara team 24 hours mein call karega.
Distributor margin volume par depend karta hai (approx 15-22%). Detailed structure ke liye humara team aapko explain karega. Distributor onboarding form bharna chahenge? [LINK]
Payment terms partner profile par depend karte hain (advance / credit options). Details call par clear ho jayengi. Aap apna city aur firm name share karenge?
Sample order bilkul possible hai! Sample kit ke liye yahan apply karein: [LINK]
GST aur statutory details onboarding ke time share ki jaati hain. Distributor onboarding form bharna chahenge? [LINK]
Territory exclusivity kuch areas mein possible hai. Aap kaunsa city/area target kar rahe hain? Ek onboarding call schedule kar dete hain.
Saare products FSSAI compliant hain. Documentation onboarding mein share ho jayegi. Aap distributor ya retailer enquiry hai?
Damaged goods ke liye replacement policy hai. Claim 48 hours ke andar raise karna hota hai. Aap order details share karenge?
New launches par distributors ko priority updates milte hain. Updates ke liye register karein: [LINK]
Kuch products category-wise storage guidance ke saath aate hain. Aap kaunsa product category dekh rahe hain? Main details share kar deta/deti hoon.
Distributors ko marketing materials (POS, digital creatives) milte hain. Onboarding call mein complete list share kar dete hain. Link: [LINK]
Business team se connect karne ke liye call book kar sakte hain: [LINK]. Ya apna number confirm kar dein, team call back karegi.
